title: Kingdom of the Creatures
description: Exciting animal adventures with nature’s pal, Martin Pardon.
quote: Watch in wonderment as he naturally burrows for his food.
altHero: Martin Pardon in nature, holding a flag, carrying a camp pack, and with a small turtle on his head
alt1: Martin Pardon holding up a tiger
alt2: Martin Pardon in a bush pointing at an armadillo in the distance
alt3: Martin Pardon with the armadillo who is holding a sign that says “no-vem-sinc-tus-
alt4: the armadillo holding an umbrella as it rains only on him creating a puddle below him
